member.name: M:Canon.Emit.IEmitter.Emit(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Canon.Introspect.TableDef})
member.summary: Generates DDL strings for the given Table definitions.

member.name: T:Canon.Emit.IEmitter
member.summary: Abstraction for database drivers to emit DDL from a TableDef schema. Converts the domain representation back to storage structures.

member.name: T:Canon.Emit.OpenSearch.OpenSearchEmitter
member.summary: Emits an OpenSearch/Elasticsearch index mapping derived from the domain schema. Converts typed fields into strict OpenSearch field types.
